name: EdwDrugClmPriceFRecon2AmountExtr

text.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT DF.CLM_SK, CLM_F.CLM_ACTL_PD_AMT,((DF.INVC_TOT_DUE_AMT)+((DF.SPREAD_INGR_CST_AMT)+(DF.SPREAD_DISPNS_FEE_AMT)+(DF.SPREAD_SLS_TAX_AMT)+(DF.SELL_INCNTV_FEE_AMT-DF.BUY_INCNTV_FEE_AMT)+(DF.SELL_OTHR_AMT-DF.BUY_TOT_OTHR_AMT))) AS CAL_CLM_ACTL_PD_AMT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLM_F CLM_F JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.DRUG_CLM_PRICE_F DF ON CLM_F.CLM_SK=DF.CLM_SK WHERE CLM_F.SRC_SYS_CD='OPTUMRX' AND CLM_F.CLM_PD_DT_SK BETWEEN '@{pipeline().parameters.BeginDate}' AND '@{pipeline().parameters.EndDate}'), cte_transform AS (SELECT CLM_SK,CASE WHEN CLM_ACTL_PD_AMT=CAL_CLM_ACTL_PD_AMT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RECON_IN FROM cte_main) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.DRUG_CLM_PRICE_F AS T USING cte_transform AS S ON (T.CLM_SK=S.CLM_SK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.RECON_IN=S.RECON_IN WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CLM_SK,RECON_IN) VALUES (S.CLM_SK,S.RECON_IN)
